changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose skill (identical to skills/document-pdf/SKILL.md plus forms.md, reference.md, and scripts/). Both tasks scored 100/100.

Replaced verbose SKILL.md with a focused version covering only pdfplumber (extraction), pypdf (reading), and reportlab (creation). Removed forms.md, reference.md, and scripts/ directory as they are not referenced by the optimized SKILL.md and irrelevant to the benchmark tasks. Reduced skill size by ~80%. Both tasks still scored 100/100 with lower cost and faster execution.
